description_long: This is a simple, box-shaped house situated on a green plot with several tall coniferous trees surrounding it and street lamps lining two sides. The house has a flat roof and a minimalist, modern design with clean lines and no visible ornamentation. The front facade features a recessed entryway with a small overhang and a set of steps leading up to the door, flanked by two large windows. The other sides of the house are mostly solid, with a few additional windows visible, providing natural light to the interior. The exterior appears to be finished in a light, neutral color, likely white or light gray, giving it a contemporary appearance. The surrounding environment suggests a suburban or urban neighborhood setting, with landscaping and street infrastructure integrated into the scene.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a minimalist design, surrounded by trees and street lamps on a green plot. The front features a recessed entryway and large windows, while the other sides are mostly solid.
description_view_0: The house is seen from the side, with several tall trees in front and street lamps to the right, showing a mostly solid wall and the flat roof.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the house, featuring a recessed entryway, steps, and two large windows, with trees and street lamps framing the scene.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is visible, showing a plain wall with minimal window openings, and street lamps lining the left side.
description_view_3: The side opposite the entryway is shown, with a single window and trees nearby, as well as street lamps along the edge of the plot.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with steps, small overhang, and large flanking windows
